steps.title: Set up equation for the unknown parts
steps.content:
Let $x$ = the length of each of the two equal parts. All three parts must sum to the total:

$$48 + x + x = 112$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown length
steps.content:
Simplify by combining like terms:

$$48 + 2x = 112$$

Subtract 48 from both sides:

$$2x = 64$$

Divide both sides by 2:

$$x = 32$$

Each of the two equal parts is 32 cm long.
